examples: The disease has left her with permanent lameness.
Her critique of the lameness of many public-health campaigns is spot-on: they fail to mobilize peer pressure for healthy habits, and they demonstrate a seriously flawed understanding of psychology.
Persistent damage or inadequate healing may lead to chronic lameness.
Veterinarians are starting to use motion sensors to detect lameness in racehorses.
Ferguson admitted that "by an act or omission" he caused the beasts unnecessary suffering by failing to provide treatment for lameness and liver fluke.
